steps.name: local-bridge-session-protocol
steps.summary: Added a pure agent-design-engine transaction protocol over existing canvas-core operations and a loopback-only Node bridge with ephemeral token auth, project path confinement, guarded revision/hash commits, monotonic event cursors, bounded replay, cursor-gap snapshot recovery, HTTP snapshots/transactions, and WebSocket broadcasts. Verified engine 5/5, bridge 5/5, and both TypeScript builds.

steps.name: terminal-mcp-adapters
steps.summary: Added one official-SDK stdio MCP adapter shared by Codex and Claude actors with get_context, apply_operations, apply_source_patch, verify, and undo tools. Deterministic child-process MCP initialize/list/context/apply/verify/undo passed for both actors; bridge context/verify/guarded undo raised bridge tests to 7/7. Installed Codex recognized one-shot config and installed Claude recognized a temporary project-scoped config as pending approval; no global config was changed and no live model call is claimed.
